name: J1939TestStmCreate_CSV
title: J1939TestStmCreate_CSV
syntax: long J1939TestStmCreate_CSV( pg aPg, dbSignal aSignal, dword cycleTime, char csvFile[] );
description: Creates a CSV Stimulus. The values for the Stimulus are loaded from a CSV file.

parameters.name: aPg
parameters.description: This parameter group is used for sending. If no sender or receiver is specified, the addresses from this PG is used. The signal of the PG can be modified during active Stimulus.

parameters.name: aSignal
parameters.description: The Stimulus works on this signal of the parameter group.

parameters.name: csvFile
parameters.description: filename of the CSV file, CANoe loads this file from the configuration directory

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
